title: InstrumentContext
description: Output contract for the qa-instrument skill — describes which components were instrumented and what data-testid attributes were added.

skipped.description: True if instrumentation was skipped (user declined, no components found, or coverage was already sufficient)

skipReason.description: Why instrumentation was skipped. Null when skipped is false.

featurePrefix.description: The kebab-case feature prefix used for all data-testid values (e.g. 'admin-login'). Null when skipped.

path.description: Relative path to the modified file

addedCount.description: Number of data-testid attributes added to this file

addedTestIds.description: List of data-testid values added in this file

skippedFiles.description: Files that were identified but could not be instrumented

reason.description: Why this file was skipped (e.g. 'write failed', 'no instrumentable elements found')

totalTestIdsAdded.description: Total number of data-testid attributes added across all files

commitSha.description: Git commit SHA of the instrumentation commit. Null if commit failed or was skipped.

updatedSelectorStrategy.description: Updated selectorStrategy block to replace in AdapterContext. Null when skipped.
